name: Agent Native Architecture
description: Build applications where agents are first-class citizens. Design autonomous agents, MCP tools, and self-modifying systems.

name: Skill Creator
description: Guide for creating effective Claude Code skills that extend capabilities with specialized knowledge, workflows, and tool integrations.

name: Create Agent Skills
description: Expert guidance for authoring SKILL.md files, slash commands, and understanding skill structure and best practices.

name: Frontend Design
description: Create distinctive, production-grade frontend interfaces with high design quality that avoid generic AI aesthetics.

name: DHH Rails Style
description: Write Ruby and Rails code in DHH's 37signals style. REST purity, fat models, thin controllers, Hotwire patterns.

name: Andrew Kane Gem Writer
description: Write Ruby gems following Andrew Kane's patterns from 100+ gems with 374M+ downloads. Minimal, production-ready.

name: DSPy Ruby
description: Build type-safe LLM applications with DSPy.rb — Ruby's programmatic prompt framework with signatures, modules, and optimization.

name: Gemini Image Generation
description: Generate and edit images using Google's Gemini API. Text-to-image, style transfers, logos, stickers, and multi-turn refinement.

name: Git Worktree Manager
description: Manage Git worktrees for isolated parallel development. Create, list, switch, and clean up worktrees with ease.

name: Rclone File Transfer
description: Upload, sync, and manage files across cloud storage providers. S3, Cloudflare R2, Backblaze B2, Google Drive, and more.

name: Security Advisory (TISA)
description: Write security advisories in the Techimpossible format. Structured analysis for CTOs, CISOs, and engineering leads.

name: Every Style Editor
description: Review and edit copy to ensure adherence to Every's style guide. Systematic line-by-line review for grammar and style.

name: Compound Docs
description: Capture solved problems as categorized documentation with YAML frontmatter for fast institutional knowledge lookup.

name: File-Based Todos
description: Manage a file-based todo tracking system. Create, triage, and resolve work items from code reviews and findings.
